projectDescription: A Python library for building hierarchical multi-agent systems using LangGraph, where a supervisor agent orchestrates specialized sub-agents via tool-based handoffs.
keyFeatures: Supervisor agent that orchestrates multiple specialized sub-agents
Tool-based handoff mechanism for agent-to-agent communication
Flexible message history management with full_history and last_message modes
Support for multi-level hierarchical agent systems
Built-in memory support via LangGraph checkpointers and stores
Customizable handoff tools with configurable names, descriptions, and arguments
Message forwarding tool to pass worker responses directly to output
Compatibility with both Graph API and Functional API agents
Agent name inline mode for non-OpenAI LLM providers
Async support for all agent invocations
publicApiSurface: create_supervisor(agents, *, model, tools, prompt, response_format, pre_model_hook, post_model_hook, parallel_tool_calls, state_schema, context_schema, output_mode, add_handoff_messages, handoff_tool_prefix, add_handoff_back_messages, supervisor_name, include_agent_name) -> StateGraph
create_handoff_tool(*, agent_name, name, description, add_handoff_messages) -> BaseTool
